name: Paul Vixie
org: UC Berkeley → DEC → ISC (Internet Systems Consortium, co-founder); Farsight Security (founder)
why_notable: Took over BIND maintenance from Berkeley and performed the first major architectural rewrite (BIND 4 → BIND 8). Founded ISC in 1994 as a nonprofit to maintain BIND as a public good. BIND 9 (2000) was a complete rewrite under his direction. Also the primary architect of DNSBL — DNS-based blackhole lists for spam filtering. Later founded Farsight Security, building passive DNS intelligence infrastructure. Kept the internet's naming system running for three decades.
